title: Write ferrum_extlib_draw_gpu.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_draw_gpu: Vulkan (primary) + OpenGL ES 3.x (fallback) GPU backend. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: Vulkan command buffer per frame, pipeline state cache, glyph atlas as Vulkan image, path tessellation to triangle fans, GLES3 fallback for older embedded (RPi 3, Android), explicit no-OpenGL-2.1 policy, swapchain sRGB handling.
